name: Nut Crescents
recipeIngredient: 2 cups unsalted softened butter or margarine
1 cup ground or finely crushed almonds, pecans or walnuts (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and confectioners' sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolks and mix well.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour and mix until a dough forms.
4. If using nuts, fold them into the dough.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut into strips and roll up tightly.
7. Place the rolls seam-side down in a greased baking dish.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
